turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content:
I'm ok. To be honest, 
I'm a therapist and I'm getting burned out on the job.

results.term: Maybe. I'm not really young anymore. The thought o...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Maybe. I'm not really young anymore. The thought of going through more school...well, I dunno about that.

results.term: I just feel like I'm in limbo. Just there. People ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I just feel like I'm in limbo. Just there. People complain all day about their problem. I have a therapist, but I think my therapist is burnt out too.

results.term: I'm too young to retire but I don't know how many ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I'm too young to retire but I don't know how many more years I can slog on with this career. It used to be pretty good. Now, it just seems the same gray job every day.

results.term: I've thought about that. I'd love to travel. I fee...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I've thought about that. I'd love to travel. I feel an obligation to my patients. I don't want to abandon them. I could pass them to other therapists, maybe temporarily. I don't know how they would feel about that.

results.term: True. They might wonder how committed I am to them...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: True. They might wonder how committed I am to them and to the profession if I go away for a while. I've thought about lightening my work load too.

results.term: Money not really the issue. I just worry that I'll...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Money not really the issue. I just worry that I'll keep burning out, just more slowly. Other therapists go through this as well.

results.term: Yeah. One day I'll be replaced by a computer. Then...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Yeah. One day I'll be replaced by a computer. Then the computers will provide therapy to other computers, who'll need a vacation when they burn out.

results.term: seriously though, I guess I could try part-time fo...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: seriously though, I guess I could try part-time for a while and see how it goes.

results.term: Try to. Humor is a defense mechanism and coping me...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Try to. Humor is a defense mechanism and coping mechanism. I have hobbies. They seem less fun because my job is less fun.

results.term: My therapist recommended medication too, but I wor...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: My therapist recommended medication too, but I worry that it might impair my ability to do my job.

results.term: Ok. That's good to know. I want to be responsible ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Ok. That's good to know. I want to be responsible to my patients, but I also have a responsibility to myself.

results.term: Thanks for your advice and honesty. I feel better ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Thanks for your advice and honesty. I feel better now.
